evidence.speaker: customer
evidence.quote: We are visiting Barcelona with my parents

decision_insights.primary_booking_reason: They wanted a memorable, hands-on local experience for a family trip instead of another restaurant dinner.
secondary_booking_reasons: Experience felt relaxed enough for parents
Less crowded than an alternative cooking class
decision_insights.what_almost_stopped_them: Price and uncertainty about stairs or walking for the customer's father.

price_sensitivity.summary: Price caused discussion but did not prevent booking because the trip felt special.

evidence.speaker: customer
evidence.quote: The price was a little higher than we expected

group_decision_dynamics.summary: Maya and her husband discussed the decision, with parent comfort influencing the choice.

evidence.speaker: customer
evidence.quote: My husband liked that it was not just watching someone cook.

decision_insights.decision_timeline: Booked for an upcoming family trip after comparing alternatives.

evidence.speaker: customer
evidence.quote: we decided it was worth it

unmet_needs: Clearer accessibility and mobility information before booking

evidence.speaker: customer
evidence.quote: wanted something more memorable than another restaurant dinner

concerns: Walking or stairs may be difficult for customer's father
dietary_or_accessibility_notes: Customer's father may have difficulty with too many stairs
logistics_feedback: Accessibility details were not fully clear before booking

evidence.speaker: customer
evidence.quote: I was not totally sure about the walking or stairs.

knowledge_base_gaps.question_or_gap: Customer was unsure about walking distance or stairs before booking.
knowledge_base_gaps.impact: Could create anxiety for guests traveling with older family members or mobility limitations.
knowledge_base_gaps.recommended_kb_update: Add clear accessibility details covering stairs, walking distance, seating, and who to contact for mobility questions.

evidence.speaker: customer
evidence.quote: I was not totally sure about the walking or stairs.

complaints_or_risks.summary: Customer's father may have difficulty if the experience involves too many stairs.

evidence.speaker: customer
evidence.quote: My dad can walk, but too many stairs are hard for him.

follow_up.summary: Customer wants someone to message her about walking and stairs because her father has mobility limitations.

evidence.speaker: customer
evidence.quote: If someone could message me about that, it would help.

action_items.title: Follow up with customer about mobility details
action_items.description: Message Maya with clear details about walking, stairs, and accessibility before the experience.

evidence.speaker: customer
evidence.quote: If someone could message me about that, it would help.

analysis_flags.manual_review_reason: Customer requested follow-up about mobility details for her father.
